description: PHP best practices: strict types, === discipline, PSR conventions, version-aware 8.1-8.5 leverage map pinned to the composer.json floor, exceptions, DateTimeImmutable, boundary security, static analysis.

interface.longDescription:
PHP best practices: strict types, === discipline, PSR-4/PSR-12 conventions, version-aware advice pinned to the composer.json floor with a per-version leverage map (8.1-8.5), exceptions, DateTimeImmutable, boundary security, value objects, static analysis. Includes /php:review.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
